author: Miha Smrekar
description: An Obsidian plugin for delaying or disabling automatic saves. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Miha Smrekar
manifest.description: Delay autosave until editing has stopped for a chosen number of seconds.
manifest.name: Autosave Control

name: Autosave Control

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 1.0.3.

Release notes:
- Bugfix - #26 - when using plugin in manual save mode, closing app via os close window command, the plugin now saves pending file changes instead of discarding changes and quitting without notification in earlier versions. This is a workaround due to a known plugin development limitation in the Obsidian ecosystem - app quit plugin behaviour should be best-effort cleanup only. Showing a notification when pressing the close window button for now is not possible/cleanly achievable.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.18.

Release notes:
- Fixed heading-link navigation so links to headings open at the requested location instead of restoring the previous cursor position.
- Switched pending-save flushing to use Obsidian’s vault API instead of direct filesystem writes.
- Release assets are now published as `main.js` and `manifest.json` instead of a zip file.
- Added release artifact attestation.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.17.

Release notes:
- fixes #23: (Android App) Stuck on Saving screen when switching vaults

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.16.

Release notes:
- Fixed quit shutdown so pending note saves and workspace layout saves complete more reliably before Obsidian exits.
- Improved manual-only mode when switching notes with unsaved changes by prompting before discarding changes.
- Improved manual-only mode when closing a dirty duplicate tab so other unsaved tabs for the same note stay intact.
- Improved manual-only mode when deleting a dirty file by prompting before discarding unsaved changes.
- Fixed pending-state cleanup when notes are deleted so stale unsaved state is not left behind.
- Fixed rename handling so renaming an existing note via the title keeps the save status correct.
- Fixed rename handling so renaming an existing note via the file manager keeps the save status correct.
- Prevented title and tab-header interactions from being tracked as editor typing activity.
- Added stronger end-to-end coverage for manual save, discard, rename, delete, and quit flows.
- Added a clean-quit verification test to confirm Obsidian fully exits after a real quit command.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.15.

Release notes:
- Adds optional deferred workspace.json saving for feature #19 .
- Prevents note switching and layout changes from triggering immediate sync updates.
- Adds a separate plugin setting and timer for deferred workspace layout saves.
- Flushes deferred layout state on manual save, autosave, quit, or when the configured workspace-layout delay expires.
- Adds regression coverage for sidebar switching, direct layout save calls, timing behavior, and app quit handling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.14.

Release notes:
- This provides fix for #18 - quick switcher (Cmd+O) modal input/keydown events were being misclassified as note edit activity, which could cause previous-note content to be applied to the newly opened note.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Automatically created release for tag 0.0.13.

Release notes:

**Testing**
- Added a full WDIO-based end-to-end test suite for plugin behavior.
- Added a dedicated real quit/unload verification test that sends a real system Cmd+Q.
- Added a large Obsidian test helper layer for opening notes, editing, switching tabs/windows, reloading the plugin, checking vault contents, and asserting status UI.
- Removed the old MANUAL-TEST-SCENARIOS.md file in favor of automated coverage.
- Added testing documentation to README.md.

**Quit / unload fixes**
- Fixed delayed-save quit behavior so pending notes are flushed during Obsidian’s real quit flow.
- Explicitly finishes app exit after the quit-time flush, fixing the bug where the window closed but the app stayed running.
- Added a filesystem-backed shutdown flush path for filesystem vaults.
- Added the external verifier script scripts/verify-quit-save.mjs.

**Plugin reload fixes**
- Fixed plugin reload races where wrapped Obsidian methods could stack or restore incorrectly.
- Made wrapper installation/removal idempotent and ownership-aware.
- Fixed stale status bar icons after reload so only one status indicator remains.

**Cursor / note switching**
- Fixed cursor restoration when switching away from a saved note and back.
- The plugin now captures the cursor position before a leaf switches files and restores it afterward.
- Test helpers were adjusted so normal editing opens at end-of-note, while cursor-preservation tests can reopen without moving the caret.

**Status / save behavior**
- Added regression coverage around delayed saves, manual saves, popup windows, note switching, tab closing, window focus changes, plugin reload, status indicator updates, settings changes, and default settings.
- Tightened some unload logic so manual-only prompts happen only in the manual-only mode path.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
